steps.description: The student unplugs the power supply and the HDMI cable.
The student puts the computer tower on the table.
The student opens the computer tower.
The student touches the metal of the computer tower.
The student removes the first RAM card.
The student removes the second RAM card.
The student withdraws the third RAM card.
The student removes the fourth RAM card.
The student inserts the first RAM card.
The student inserts the second RAM card.
The student inserts the third RAM card.
The student inserts the fourth RAM card.
The student closes the computer tower.
